channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: This economist studied 400 years of recessions. His bleak conclusion: stop trying to predict them
item.description: Tyler Goodspeed's sweeping new book dismantles the idea that downturns follow predictable patterns: history is the only thing guaranteed to keep repea...

item.title: ‘If he tells you he can beat me, I’ll sue!’: Inside the $9 billion friendship between the CEOs of Amex and Delta
item.description: Amex's Steve Squeri and Delta's Ed Bastian clicked so well that they are now buddies in pursuing both profit and fun.

item.title: These experts made their careers grading travel credit cards and they say you’re being ripped off. It’s a $1.28 trillion crisis
item.description: The industry has "sold the dream to people who probably don't need that dream sold to them — and should just be getting a flat 2% cash back card."

item.title: Tim Cook and Reed Hastings just showed every CEO how to leave gracefully
item.description: To paraphrase John Updike, the hub fans bid the CEO kids adieu.
